case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC. VS. REGINALD L WISE et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WISE, REGINALD L DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-02-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC. SERVED SEP-27-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WISE, REGINALD L
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WISE, REGINALD L $7,837.40 PRINCIPAL, $1,125.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $914.15 INTEREST, $227.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,103.55, SEE SCANNED DOC
